THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEHRAZAR, MEHRZAD SAFA, SAM AKA SAID HAGAR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 935 QUINTARA ST. $2,700.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,700.00, STAYED UNTIL MAY-30-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, JDMT AS TO M MEHRAZAR BY STIP & AS TO S SAFA AFTER ENTRY OF DEFAULT. MONEY JDMT AS TO M MEHRAZAR ONLY. IF HE VACATES BY 5PM 5-30-95, PLTF WILL WAIVE MONEY, VACATE JDMT & DISMISS. PLTF TO KEEP $500 SECURITY DEPOSIT TO COVER UTILITIES, PER STIP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEHRAZAR, MEHRZAD SAFA, SAM AKA SAID HAGAR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES NOT AT ISSUE $2,700.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,700.00, LEASE FORFEITED, JDMT AS TO M MEHRAZAR BY STIP & AS TO S SAFA AFTER ENTRY OF DEFAULT. BACK RENT & DAMAGES AS TO BOTH DEFTS. COSTS PER COST BILL AS TO SAM SAFA ONLY. PLTF TO KEEP $500 SECURITY DEPOSIT TO COVER UTILITIES PER STIP.
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $160.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE JUL-03-1995, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG, HAWLEY

MOTION TO ENFORCE TERMS OF STIP JDGMT,VACATE 2ND AMEND/JDGMT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT MEHRAZAR, MEHRZAD HEARING SET FOR JUL-10-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO ENFORCE TERMS OF STIP JDGMT,VACATE 2ND AMEND/JDGMT, CALENDAR OF JUL-10-1995 GRANTED IN PART, DENIED IN PART. 2ND AMENDED JUDGMENT VACATED PURSUANT TO CCP 473, FOR LACK OF DUE PROCESS. THE WRIT OF EXECUTION AND MONEY JUDGMENT IS DISSOLVED, AS WELL AS RELATED LEVIES. DEFT'S ATTY. TO PREPARE ORDER.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG, HAWLEY AS TO DEFENDANT MEHRAZAR, MEHRZAD SAFA, SAM AKA SAID HAGAR DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED
